Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant David E. Tate (Dba Pacifica Auto Parts, Dba Pacifica Machine And Parts)
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant David E. Tate, dba Pacifica Auto Parts, dba Pacifica Machine & Parts.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Rikus Linschoten, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Stephen F. Mills, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defaulted defendant David E. Tate, dba Pacifica Auto Parts, dba Pacifica Machine & Parts.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on April 26, 2016 and served on May 9, 2016.
Statement of Damages for defendant David E. Tate, dba Pacifica Auto Parts, dba Pacifica Machine & Parts was served on May 9, 2016 and filed on July 6, 2016.
Default was entered against defendant David E. Tate, dba Pacifica Auto Parts, dba Pacifica Machine & Parts on July 6, 2016.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on May 3, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Stephen F. Mills, and against the Defaulted Defendant David E. Tate, dba Pacifica Auto Parts, dba Pacifica Machine & Parts, as follows:

Economic Damages - $105,250.00.
Non-Economic Damages - $750,000.00
Total - $855,250.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
